chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1383 of 2022 Date order with Signature of Hon’ble Judge For non-prosecution 13.09.2023 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioners Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that the purpose of filing this petition has been served, therefore, he does not press the same. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed. Judge Judge ARBROHI
